description: Route inventory for generating Postman documentation. Give this file to Claude/MCP to run the routes and create docs.

routes.name: Health Check
routes.description: Checks whether the Express server is running.
routes.notes: No request body is required for this endpoint.

plannedRoutes.notes: Add register/login/logout/profile routes here after JWT auth is implemented.
Add create/read/update/delete endpoints here after models, controllers, and route files are implemented.

postmanGenerationInstructions: Use baseUrl as a Postman collection variable named baseUrl.
For each item in routes, create one Postman request using method, url, headers, queryParams, pathParams, and requestBody.
If requestBody is null, do not attach a JSON body.
Run every route and capture the actual status code and response body for documentation.
Use expectedResponse only as a reference; prefer the live response from the running server.
